title: Jesus Loves Me
first_line: Jesus loves me! this I know,

verses.lines:
Jesus loves me! this I know,
For the Bible tells me so;
Little ones to Him belong,
They are weak but He is strong.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yes, Jesus loves me!
Yes, Jesus loves me!
Yes, Jesus loves me!
The Bible tells me so.

Jesus loves me! He who died,
Heaven's gates to open wide;
He will wash away my sin,
Let His little child come in.

Jesus loves me! He will stay,
Close beside me all the way;
Thou hast bled and died for me,
I will henceforth live for Thee.

Jesus loves me! leads me on,
All the way to heaven's throne;
He will take me there some day,
When I've walked life's narrow way.

title: I Washed My Hands
first_line: I washed my hands this morning,

verses.lines:
I washed my hands this morning,
And gave them to the Lord;
To work for Jesus only,
According to His word.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
My feet shall walk for Jesus,
Go where He wants me to;
For Jesus only, always,
In everything I do.

My ears shall hear for Jesus,
All that is good and true;
And everything He tells me,
I'll gladly follow through.

My eyes shall look for Jesus,
And seek the truth always;
I need to keep them steady,
To serve Him all my days.

My tongue I'll give to Jesus,
To speak His holy name;
To tell of things that are right,
And bring His world to fame.

I'll look to Him in all things,
In everything I do;
And keep from sin and evil,
In Jesus' name so true.

title: God Sees the Little Sparrow Fall
first_line: God sees the little sparrow fall,

verses.lines:
God sees the little sparrow fall,
It meets His tender view;
If God so loves the little birds,
I know He loves me too.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
He loves me too, He loves me too,
I know He loves me too;
Because He loves the little things,
I know He loves me too.

He paints the lily of the field,
Perfumes each lily bell;
If He so loves the little flow'rs,
I know He loves me well.

God made the little birds and flow'rs,
And all things large and small;
He'll not forget His little ones,
I know He loves them all.

title: I Hear the Shillings Dropping
first_line: I hear the shillings dropping,

verses.lines:
I hear the shillings dropping,
Dropping in the bag;
We give them all to Jesus,
Who owns them all.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
The shillings drop, hear them dropping,
We give them to the Lord;
We give them all to Jesus,
Who owns them every one.

We give them every morning,
All of us children;
This is our offering,
For us the young.

Jesus we are children,
We bring our gift to Thee;
But as we grow older,
More we'll gladly give.

We have this to give Thee,
We love Thee so much;
This is our sacrifice,
For Thy great grace.

title: Omutambuze Nze
first_line: — English lyrics coming soon —

verses.lines: — English lyrics coming soon —

title: Awo Yesu Bwe Yatambula
first_line: — English lyrics coming soon —

verses.lines: — English lyrics coming soon —

title: Yesu Mulokozi Wange
first_line: — English lyrics coming soon —

verses.lines: — English lyrics coming soon —

title: Happy, Happy Home
first_line: There is beauty all around,

verses.lines:
There is beauty all around,
When there's love at home;
There is joy in every sound,
When there's love at home.

Jesus in our home today,
Makes it bright and gay;
Keeps the shadows all away,
When He comes to stay.

Jesus with our mother dear,
Drives away all fear;
Fills our home with gladsome cheer,
When He's always near.

Jesus in your heart today,
Brings the sweetest ray;
Keeps all sin and grief away,
Every happy day.

title: Go Little Pennies
first_line: Go little pennies, carry the message to all;

verses.lines:
Go little pennies, carry the message to all;
To the little children, that they may be saved.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Go little pennies, go tell the story;
Jesus the Lord of grace, the friend of man.

Go tell the story, all that we do here;
That they too may learn, just as we have learned.

Though we are little, the Lord is pleased with us;
Doing His work here, telling the children.

title: I Will Wear a Crown
first_line: I will wear a crown up in heaven;

verses.lines:
I will play my harp up in heaven,
Up in heaven, up in heaven,
I will play my harp up in heaven,
There'll be joy, such joy.

I will wear a robe up in heaven,
Up in heaven, up in heaven;
I will wear a robe up in heaven,
There'll be joy, such joy.

title: Up, Up in the Sky
first_line: Up, up in the sky, the little birds fly;

title: Into My Heart
first_line: Into my heart, into my heart,

verses.lines:
Into my heart, into my heart,
Come into my heart, Lord Jesus;
Come in today, come in to stay,
Come into my heart, Lord Jesus.

title: Thank You for the World so Sweet
first_line: Thank You for the world so sweet,

verses.lines:
Thank You for the world so sweet,
Thank You for the food we eat;
Thank You for the birds that sing,
Thank You, God, for everything.

Thank You for our home so dear,
And for sunshine bright and clear;
For the sky so wide and fair,
And for all things everywhere.

title: Whisper a Prayer in the Morning
first_line: Whisper a prayer in the morning,

verses.lines:
Whisper a prayer in the morning,
Whisper a prayer at noon;
Whisper a prayer in the evening,
To keep your heart in tune.

Jesus will hear your praying,
Every hour of the day;
Jesus will hear your praying,
And bless you on your way.

He may come in the morning,
Or at the close of day;
Or He may come at midnight,
Be watching and ready, stay.

title: Missionary Band
first_line: We are a band of children,

verses.lines:
We are a band of children,
Weak and small are we;
But we all love Jesus,
And serve Him faithfully.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
We are the Lord's own army,
His army, His army;
We are the Lord's own army,
Serving Him today.

There are many children,
Far across the sea;
Who do not know of Jesus,
And need Him just like me.

We will send them teachers,
Who will go and pray;
That the Lord and Savior,
Will wash their sins away.

Jesus came to earth here,
Died for everyone;
Those who trust and love Him,
Shall joy when life is done.

title: The Reason
first_line: — English lyrics coming soon —

verses.lines: — English lyrics coming soon —

title: The Seventh is for Jesus
first_line: — English lyrics coming soon —

verses.lines: — English lyrics coming soon —

title: I Will Make You Fishers of Men
first_line: I will make you fishers of men,

verses.lines:
I will make you fishers of men,
Fishers of men, fishers of men;
I will make you fishers of men,
If you follow Me.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Hear Christ calling, come to Me,
Come to Me, come to Me;
Hear Christ calling, come to Me,
And find your rest.

Jesus Christ is coming again,
Coming soon, coming soon;
Jesus Christ is coming again,
To take us home.

title: Always be Cheerful
first_line: We are children of the King,

verses.lines:
We are children of the King,
He has said, "Be always cheerful;"
In our hearts a song we'll sing,
For the King who loves us all.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
With joy in our hearts, we'll follow our Savior;
He fills us with gladness, every day He cheers us.

Praise the Lord who keeps us safe,
On the journey He is near us;
He has promised us His grace,
He will never, never leave us.

Young and old, let's be courageous,
Never tire on the way;
We will never, never weaken,
As we labor day by day.

When the enemy grows strong,
And our hearts begin to tremble;
Fear of foes shall not prevail,
For our joy shall never dwindle.

title: This Little Light of Mine
first_line: This little light of mine, I'm gonna let it shine;

verses.lines:
This little light of mine, I'm gonna let it shine;
This little light of mine, I'm gonna let it shine; Let it shine x3

Hide it under a bushel? No! I'm gonna let it shine,
Hide it under a bushel? No! I'm gonna let it shine; Let it shine x3

Won't let Satan blow it out, I'm gonna let it shine,
Won't let Satan blow it out, I'm gonna let it shine; Let it shine x3

Jesus is coming soon, I'm gonna let it shine,
Jesus is coming soon, I'm gonna let it shine; Let it shine x3

Let it shine till Jesus comes, I'm gonna let it shine,
Let it shine till Jesus comes, I'm gonna let it shine; Let it shine x3

title: The Trees are Gently Swaying
first_line: The trees are gently swaying, swaying, swaying;

verses.lines:
The trees are gently swaying, swaying, swaying;
The trees are gently swaying, God loves us.

The butterflies are flying, flying, flying;
The butterflies are flying, God loves us.

The birds are gently singing, singing, singing;
The birds are gently singing, God loves us.

The flowers are gently swaying, swaying, swaying;
The flowers are gently swaying, God loves us.

And we are gently swaying, swaying, swaying;
And we are gently swaying, God loves us.

title: I'm a Little Star for Jesus
first_line: I'm a little star for Jesus, shining through the night;

verses.lines:
I'm a little star for Jesus, shining through the night;
I'm a little star for Jesus, shining with His light.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
I'm a little star of gladness;
(I'm a little star for Jesus.) x2

I'm a little star for Jesus, I will never dim;
I'm a little star for Jesus, always shining for Him.

I'm a little star for Jesus, in this world of sin;
Shining bright for Jesus, till He comes again.

title: Jesus Loves the Little Children
first_line: Jesus loves the little children, all the children of the world;

verses.label: Chorus

title: Praise Him! Little Children
first_line: Praise Him, praise Him, all ye little children,

verses.lines:
Praise Him, praise Him, all ye little children,
God is love, God is love;
Praise Him, praise Him, all ye little children,
God is love, God is love.

Love Him, love Him, all ye little children,
God is love, God is love;
Love Him, love Him, all ye little children,
God is love, God is love.

Serve Him, serve Him, all ye little children,
God is love, God is love;
Serve Him, serve Him, all ye little children,
God is love, God is love.

title: God Made Me
first_line: Each morning says, "God made me wonderfully well!"

verses.lines:
Each morning says, "God made me wonderfully well!"
Each morning says, "He made me on the first day."

The clouds all say, "He made me wonderfully well!"
The clouds all say, "He made me on the second day."

The flowers all say, "He made me wonderfully well!"
The flowers all say, "He made me on the third day."

The twinkling stars say, "He made us wonderfully well!"
All the stars say, "He made us on the fourth day."

The mother hen says, "God made me wonderfully well!"
The mother hen says, "He made me on the fifth day."

The man and woman say, "He made us wonderfully well!"
In the image of God truly, "On the sixth day."

The Sabbath day says, "He made me wonderfully well!"
With blessing and with honour, "On the seventh day."

title: Give Me Oil in My Lamp
first_line: Give me oil in my lamp, keep me burning;

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Sing hosanna, sing hosanna,
Sing hosanna to the King of kings! x2

title: We Thank Thee
first_line: We thank Thee, Jesus, for Thy love;

verses.lines:
We thank Thee, Jesus, for Thy love;
And for the many blessings Thou hast given.

For keeping us and clothing us;
And life and joy and happiness Thou givest.

In our homes and with our families;
For all Thy gifts we praise Thee, Lord Jesus.

title: Bring Ye All the Tithes
first_line: Bring ye all the tithes into the storehouse,

verses.lines:
Bring ye all the tithes into the storehouse,
Bring them all to Me this day;
I will pour you out a blessing,
There shall be no lack for aye.

title: Goodbye Song
first_line: Now we've come to the end, we're going home,
